description: Agentic Command Palette: Wire CommandPaletteUI + AskQuant AI button into apps via shared AppProviders pattern
steps: Step 1 - Create CommandPalette provider in shared-ui: Add packages/shared-ui/src/components/CommandPaletteUI/CommandPaletteProvider.tsx that: (a) listens for Cmd+K / Ctrl+K globally, (b) manages open state, (c) provides registerCommand/unregisterCommand context API for apps to register app-specific commands, (d) includes built-in cross-app navigation commands (Go to Mail, Go to Chat, Go to AI, etc), (e) includes 'Ask Quant' command that opens AISidePanel.

Step 2 - Create AskQuant integration: Add a hook packages/shared-ui/src/hooks/useAskQuant.ts that connects to QuantAI's cross-app orchestrator at /api/ai/orchestrate (POST with {query, context, appId}). Returns streaming response. Wire this into the AISidePanel component (already exists at packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/AISidePanel.tsx).
Step 3 - Update shared-ui exports: Add CommandPaletteProvider, useCommandPalette, useAskQuant to packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts exports.

Step 4 - Integrate into QuantTube: In apps/quantube/src/pages/_app.tsx, wrap with CommandPaletteProvider. Register app-specific commands (Search videos, Upload video, Go to Music, Go to Library, Toggle dark mode). Add floating 'Ask Quant' button.
Step 5 - Integrate into QuantMax: In apps/quantmax/src/pages/_app.tsx, wrap with CommandPaletteProvider. Register commands (Discover matches, Start video chat, Go to profile, Safety settings).
Step 6 - Integrate into QuantNeon: In apps/quantneon/src/pages/_app.tsx, wrap with CommandPaletteProvider. Register commands (Post photo, Create reel, Explore, Shop, AR filters).
Step 7 - Integrate into QuantEdits: In apps/quantedits/src/pages/_app.tsx, wrap with CommandPaletteProvider. Register commands (New project, Add layer, Apply effect, Export, AI edit, Templates).
Step 8 - Integrate into QuantMeet and QuantDocs: Both use App Router, so add CommandPaletteProvider in their layout.tsx files. Register appropriate commands.

Step 9 - Add /api/ai/orchestrate route to QuantAI app: Create apps/quantai/src/app/api/orchestrate/route.ts that proxies to the backend's cross-app orchestrator endpoint. This provides the unified AI entry point for 'Ask Quant' across all apps.
acceptance_criteria: CommandPaletteProvider exists in shared-ui with Cmd+K listener and context API
useAskQuant hook streams responses from QuantAI orchestrator
At least 5 apps have CommandPaletteProvider integrated
Each integrated app registers at least 4 app-specific commands
